name: Merge Rot
author: Poki
description: Merge Rot is the brainrot watermelon-style merge game with a chaotic twist! Drop different items into a cup and watch them merge into bigger, weirder versions when they collide. From trendy Italian Brainrot and Giga themes to adorable Dogs, Cats, Fellas, and Capybaras—there’s a wild theme for everyone! Pick your favorite, drop ‘til you can’t, and see what madness you can create! Merge Fellas Merge Rot or Merge Fellas? Which is it? Originally released under the name Merge Fellas, the game has since its web browser release become widely known as Merge Rot. While the name evolved, the gameplay hasn’t. Merge, upgrade, and keep setting new records! How to play Merge Rot? Move your item with the mouse and click to drop it! Who created Merge Rot? Merge Rot is created by TapMen. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Merge Rot for free? You can play Merge Rot for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Rot on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Rot can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
